title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects · Spiral Review
summary: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish value transformations from identity-changing commands in an execution trace.
Locate I/O, mutation, time, randomness, and exceptions and move them behind explicit boundaries.
Test whether an expression can be replaced by its value without changing program behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Value Model value-and-effect pipeline for this review task before implementing it.
